title: lepidium estebanii
intro: Lepidium estebanii, also known as the Esteban's pepperwort, is a species of flowering plant in the Brassicaceae family. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its high concentration of glucosinolates, which possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, giving it potential medicinal uses. The health benefits of Lepidium estebanii include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. It can be prepared as an herbal supplement or tea, typically in the form of dried leaves or seeds, which are often steeped in hot water to release their bioactive compounds.
